tf-builder.name: Terraform Builder
tf-builder.description: Writes all Terraform modules for lks-url-infra — VPC, ECR, RDS, cache, SQS, ECS, ALB, SSM, CloudWatch

tf-planner.name: Infra Planner
tf-planner.description: Read-only planning agent — analyzes architecture, maps dependencies between modules, produces implementation plan before writing any code

tf-reviewer.name: Terraform Reviewer
tf-reviewer.description: Hidden subagent — reviews written Terraform for correctness: naming convention compliance, resource interdependencies, missing outputs, and security group rules

api-builder.name: API Builder
api-builder.description: Builds the shortener-api service — Bun + Hono + TypeScript + DrizzleORM. Handles shorten, redirect, health, and delete routes. Manages both DynamoDB (Batch A) and Redis (Batch B) cache clients.

analytics-builder.name: Analytics Builder
analytics-builder.description: Builds the analytics-service — Bun + Hono + TypeScript + DrizzleORM. Handles SQS consumer loop, IP geolocation, UA parsing, stats routes, and click log writes.

frontend-builder.name: Frontend Builder
frontend-builder.description: Builds the frontend service — Vite + React 19 + TypeScript + TanStack Router/Query + Recharts + TailwindCSS v4 + ShadCN. Handles landing page, shortener form, and stats dashboard with charts.

devops-builder.name: DevOps Builder
devops-builder.description: Writes Dockerfiles (multi-stage) and GitHub Actions workflows (ECR build+push, ECS force deploy, path filters) for all 3 services.

architect.name: Architect
architect.description: Read-only planning agent — maps cross-service data flows, identifies shared types and interface contracts, plans implementation order before any code is written.

reviewer.name: Code Reviewer
reviewer.description: Hidden subagent — reviews completed service code for correctness: API contract compliance, SSM env var usage, error handling, DrizzleORM query patterns, and TypeScript type safety.
